compute: ECS Fargate task CPU and memory must use supported Fargate combinations.
Application Load Balancer is recommended for public HTTP services.
Use Service Auto Scaling for steady production workloads.
functions: AWS Lambda maximum execution timeout is 15 minutes.
Deployment package and container image size limits apply.
Use provisioned concurrency for latency-sensitive workloads.
database: RDS instance family and storage limits vary by engine and region.
Multi-AZ deployment increases availability and cost.
Backups and maintenance windows should be explicitly configured.
storage: S3 object size limit is 5 TB.
Versioning and lifecycle policies should be enabled for durable workloads.
Public access should remain blocked unless explicitly required.
